channel.title: Breakthrough Medicine
channel.description: Intelligence brief on the future of medicine, biotech, and health innovation.
channel.itunes:author: Knowledge Studio
channel.itunes:summary: Intelligence brief on the future of medicine, biotech, and health innovation.

item.title: Pancreatic Cancer Vaccine Offers New Hope for Patients
item.description:
Welcome. We're covering some genuinely transformative developments in medicine today—the kind of signals that don't just represent incremental progress, but shifts in how we're fundamentally approaching disease. Let's start with what I think is the most important story.
There's a pancreatic cancer ...

item.title: future_medicine Daily Brief — April 20, 2026
item.description: Hello, and welcome. Today we're watching what might be the most important inflection point in medicine since mRNA vaccines proved themselves in the real world. We're not just seeing advances in cancer treatment anymore—we're watching an entire economic model shift. Cell therapy is becoming a commodi...

item.title: future_medicine Daily Brief — March 24, 2026
item.description: Welcome back. We're going to walk through what's happening in medicine right now, and I think you're going to see why this moment feels different. There's a genuine inflection point forming—not just incremental progress, but compression happening across multiple dimensions at once. That's what I wan...
